chunks.content: Backfill cursor progress advances only after captured rows are durably inserted into memory.db. This prevents skipped assistant memories when the write queue is full.
Archive delete must verify gzip hash, archive row metadata, and file existence before removing session trees from the hot opencode database.

Do not add sqlite-vec yet. We are not implementing sqlite vec right now. Keep the streaming brute force vector scan canonical until telemetry shows vectorMs p95 or candidate counts are real bottlenecks.
The memory taxonomy includes bug, decision, invariant, api_contract, migration, test_strategy, perf_note, and product_requirement for precise scoped retrieval.
The Engram dashboard should have CLI, TUI, and JSON output only. Do not build a browser dashboard for local telemetry and archive status.

queries.query: How should backfill avoid skipping rows when persisting progress?
What must happen before deleting archived hot database sessions?
not implementing sqlite vec right now
Engram dashboard should have CLI TUI and JSON output only
